chunks.en: I usually take a bath at night.
chunks.ja: 私はたいてい夜にお風呂に入ります。

chunks.en: I take a bath after I finish work.
chunks.ja: 仕事を終えたあとにお風呂に入ります。

chunks.en: I use soap and shampoo every day.
chunks.ja: 毎日、石けんとシャンプーを使います。

chunks.en: I wash my hair and my body.
The warm water makes me feel relaxed.
chunks.ja: 温かいお湯が私をリラックスさせてくれます。

chunks.en: I stay in the bath for twenty minutes.
chunks.ja: 私は20分ほどお風呂に入っています。

chunks.en: After the bath, I drink some cold water.
chunks.ja: お風呂のあとは、冷たい水を飲みます。

chunks.en: So a bath helps me sleep well.
chunks.ja: だからお風呂はよく眠るのに役立ちます。

outline: Opening: when I take a bath
Point 1: what I use, soap and shampoo
Point 2: how warm and relaxed I feel
Wrap-up: what I do after the bath

modelTalk.text: I love my bath time. I take a bath at night. It's the end of my day. First, I turn on the warm water. I get in slowly. Then I wash my body with soap. I also use shampoo for my hair. The water feels so nice and warm. My body gets warm too. I close my eyes and relax. I don't think about work now. I just feel calm and happy. After my bath, I dry my body. I put on my soft clothes. Then I drink a big glass of water. I'm thirsty after the warm bath. It's a good way to end my day.

chunks.en: I usually take a bath at night before bed.
chunks.ja: 私はたいてい夜、寝る前にお風呂に入ります。

chunks.en: I use soap and shampoo to wash my body.
chunks.ja: 私は体を洗うのに石けんとシャンプーを使います。

chunks.en: I like to sit in warm water for ten minutes.
chunks.ja: 私は温かいお湯に10分ほど浸かるのが好きです。

chunks.en: The warm water helps me feel calm and relaxed.
chunks.ja: 温かいお湯は私を穏やかでリラックスした気分にしてくれます。

chunks.en: After my bath, I always drink a glass of water.
chunks.ja: お風呂のあと、私はいつもコップ一杯の水を飲みます。

chunks.en: Then I dry my hair and put on soft clothes.
chunks.ja: それから私は髪を乾かして、柔らかい服を着ます。

chunks.en: My bath time is the best part of my day.
chunks.ja: お風呂の時間は私の一日で一番良い時間です。

outline: Opening: when I take my bath
Point 1: what I use to wash
Wrap-up: what I do after the bath

modelTalk.text: I love my bath time. I take a bath at night. It's the best time for me. First, I wash my hair. I use shampoo and soap. The water is warm and nice. I sit in the bath for ten minutes. My body feels warm and soft. I close my eyes and relax. I don't think about work. It's so quiet and calm. After my bath, I feel clean and happy. I dry my hair with a towel. Then I drink a big glass of water. I'm thirsty after a warm bath. Then I go to bed. I sleep very well.
